title: jasminum multiflorum f. subelongatum
intro: Jasminum multiflorum f. subelongatum is a lesser-known variant of the Jasminum multiflorum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum multiflorum f. subelongatum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used in the form of teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health benefits.
